channel.title: Home on mazo | cybersec
channel.description: Recent content in Home on mazo | cybersec

item.title: About
item.description:
Hi, I’m Ivan Mazan, also known as mazo.

I’m building my cybersecurity skills through CTF challenges, lab work, self-hosted experiments, and hands-on security projects.

This site is meant to document my progress and collect the work I want to show publicly.

Interests

  • Linux
  • Networking
  • CTFs
  • Web security
  • Detection and monitoring
  • Practical labs

About this site
